title: Sawdust
description: A small mod that adds sawdust and sawdust related stuff
body:
# Sawdust
> to make sawdust, you need a wood shaver. which is 1 stick with a plank on top. and it is a food source and an ingredient.

# Cardboard
> You can make cardboard with sawdust, but you'll need to figure out how ;). cardboard is basically like a metal, but cardboard, also you need tape to make the tools. tape is made with paper (dont ask how).





<details>
<summary>warning</summary>

### DONT EAT SAWDUST IN REAL LIFE, ITS NOT GOOD
it sounds wierd, but you can in this mod, and its a joke. dont do it, please :I

</details>

thats all for now, enjoy the mod :)
